docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,740.00 FILED BY VALLE, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF'S LETTER AND DEFENDANTS AGREEMENT SHOWN TO CLERK IN COURT, CASE SETTLED. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

TRIAL RESET TO OCT-03-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-20-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
